name: Osto Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table: Storage, Glossy Finish - Christopher Knight Home
description: The Christopher Knight Home Osto Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table offers a clear late 60's vibe to any room it is placed in. With a rotating top and extra storage underneath this table is multifunctional and unique. Place it in front of your couch for a spot to hold your drink, magazines or a book. Make a statement in your home with the Christopher Knight Home Osto Small Oval Rotatable Coffee Table. It will become a conversation piece.
